'''Ali-Alann''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who was in charge of the nursery where he watched over [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|younglings]] during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Ali-Alann was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

By [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], Ali-Alann served the Order by overseeing the [[Youngling/Legends|youngest]] of the Jedi [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|students]] within the nurseries of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While serving in this capacity, the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] began his [[Incident at the Jedi Temple|campaign of sabotage]] against the Temple. As Ali-Alann escorted a clan of ten younglings to the [[Jedi Temple refectory/Legends|Jedi Temple Refectory]] via a [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] car which ran over the [[Lake level|Lake Level]], Xanatos sprung his trap. The car became destabilized and teetered over the lake, threatening to plunge into the waters several stories below. Luckily for Ali-Alann, [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Bant Eerin/Legends|Bant Eerin]] were in the lake chamber and rushed to assist. Kenobi was able to enter the car while being cautious of not rocking it off the tracks. As the last of the students were evacuated, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], fetched by Eerin, used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to lower the car to the ground.<ref name="TCT" />

Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and Kenobi soon discovered that Xanatos was having Master [[Tahl]]'s assistance droid, [[2JTJ]], keep track of the goings-on in the Temple. Because of Ali-Alann's physical similarities to Jinn, the Masters decided to swap identities to draw the spy droid off of Jinn's trail as he moved to capture Xanatos. With Padawan [[Garen Muln]] at his side disguised as Kenobi, Ali-Alann used a recording of Jinn's voice in order to lure the droid away from the Temple's [[treasury room]] while the other two Jedi drove Xanatos out of the Temple.<ref name="TCT" />

By the time Kenobi took [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] as his Padawan, Ali-Alann had been assigned a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] helper in the nursery. When the droid required a new [[Motivator/Legends|motivator]] that could not be found in the Temple's [[Technical division/Legends|technical division]], a Padawan named [[Tru Veld/Legends|Tru Veld]] decided to surprise Ali-Alann and procure a new motivator. Veld found one in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]], but at the same time, the motivator had been discovered by Skywalker. The two boys argued over the motivator, but Skywalker was ashamed to realize that he only wanted it for himself, whereas Veld wanted it to help another. Upon their return to the Jedi Temple, Skywalker's absence was questioned by Kenobi, but Veld covered for Skywalker. The experience forged a bond between the two that led to friendship.<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Way of the Apprentice">''[[Jedi Quest: The Way of the Apprentice]]''</ref>

Remaining at the Temple throughout the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], to tend to the younglings still stationed there, Ali-Alann was present when [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], having been discovered to be the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], sent the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] to [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|raid]] the complex. Within the halls of the Temple, Ali-Alann perished while defending the younglings he had protected for so long.<ref name="TCSWE" />
